Wooden Table

EmptyDecoratedBurnt

The Round Wooden Table and Square Wooden Table are craftable Structures exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. They can be crafted in the Decorations Filter with 2 Boards and 1 Rope and require a Sawhorse to prototype.

Stone Table

The Stone Round Table and Stone Square Table are craftable Structures exclusive to Don't Starve Together. They can be crafted in the Decorations Filter with 3 Cut Stone and 2 Rope and require an upgraded Sawhorse with Moon Glass Saw Blade to prototype.

Sanctum Relic

Sanctum Relic as table can be found in the Playbill Room of the Sanctum. One of the tables holds the playbill "A Task Complete" and the other holds a Waymark Compass.

EmptyDecoratedBurnt
“I use tables periodically.”
–Wilson, when examining an empty Wooden Table
“That will definitely burn.”
–Willow, when examining an empty Wooden Table
“Is table.”
–Wolfgang, when examining an empty Wooden Table
“Abigail's favorite hiding spot.”
–Wendy, when examining an empty Wooden Table
“IT IS A TABLE”
–WX-78, when examining an empty Wooden Table
“Perfect for enjoying a cup of tea and a good book.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining an empty Wooden Table
“That's a nice wood grain, eh?”
–Woodie, when examining an empty Wooden Table
“Someone should really set this table.”
–Maxwell, when examining an empty Wooden Table
“Nö sörrier sight than a bare table. Let us plunder!”
–Wigfrid, when examining an empty Wooden Table
“I remember drawing at the table.”
–Webber, when examining an empty Wooden Table
“All it's missing are homecooked food and good wine.”
–Warly, when examining an empty Wooden Table
“Empty table”
–Wormwood, when examining an empty Wooden Table
“I don't care if it's fancy, just solidly built.”
–Winona, when examining an empty Wooden Table
“Now, will the tables turn?”
–Wortox, when examining an empty Wooden Table
“Table not set yet!”
–Wurt, when examining an empty Wooden Table
“Woby, no paws on the table!”
–Walter, when examining an empty Wooden Table
“A table. Will wonders never cease.”
–Wanda, when examining an empty Wooden Table
“I use tables periodically.”
–Wilson, when examining a decorated Wooden Table
“That will definitely burn.”
–Willow, when examining a decorated Wooden Table
“Is table.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a decorated Wooden Table
“Abigail's favorite hiding spot.”
–Wendy, when examining a decorated Wooden Table
“CONGRATULATIONS TABLE, YOU HAVE FULFILLED YOUR PRIMARY FUNCTION”
–WX-78, when examining a decorated Wooden Table
“Perfect for enjoying a cup of tea and a good book.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a decorated Wooden Table
“Hey, yer covering up that quality wood!”
–Woodie, when examining a decorated Wooden Table
“Someone should really set this table.”
–Maxwell, when examining a decorated Wooden Table
“Nöt the möst impressive piece öf löot.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a decorated Wooden Table
“I remember drawing at the table.”
–Webber, when examining a decorated Wooden Table
“All it's missing are homecooked food and good wine.”
–Warly, when examining a decorated Wooden Table
“Table full”
–Wormwood, when examining a decorated Wooden Table
“It's doin' what tables do.”
–Winona, when examining a decorated Wooden Table
“The centerpiece has been set.”
–Wortox, when examining a decorated Wooden Table
“Wicker-lady! Table all set!”
–Wurt, when examining a decorated Wooden Table
“Woby, no paws on the table!”
–Walter, when examining a decorated Wooden Table
“Yes, there is something on it.”
–Wanda, when examining a decorated Wooden Table
“I don't think I'll be using it anymore.”
–Wilson, when examining a burnt Wooden Table
“Yup. It burned.”
–Willow, when examining a burnt Wooden Table
“Is not table anymore.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a burnt Wooden Table
“Just as well.”
–Wendy, when examining a burnt Wooden Table
“ERROR: MISSING TABLE”
–WX-78, when examining a burnt Wooden Table
“What a shame.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a burnt Wooden Table
“Too bad, eh?”
–Woodie, when examining a burnt Wooden Table
“It didn't go with the decor anyway.”
–Maxwell, when examining a burnt Wooden Table
“The göds need nöt möre tables.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a burnt Wooden Table
“Too bad.”
–Webber, when examining a burnt Wooden Table
“C'est tragique.”
–Warly, when examining a burnt Wooden Table
“Oh. Bye bye”
–Wormwood, when examining a burnt Wooden Table
“A shame to see that craftsmanship go to waste.”
–Winona, when examining a burnt Wooden Table
“Hyuyu! How silly!”
–Wortox, when examining a burnt Wooden Table
“Didn't do it, florp!”
–Wurt, when examining a burnt Wooden Table
“Someone forgot their fire saftey!”
–Walter, when examining a burnt Wooden Table
“Its days were numbered in a place like this.”
–Wanda, when examining a burnt Wooden Table
The Round Wooden Table and Square Wooden Table are craftable Structures exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. They can be crafted in the Decorations Filter with 2 Boards and 1 Rope and require a Sawhorse to prototype.

They can be crafted in the [[Decorations Filter]] with 3 [[Cut Stone]] and 2 [[Rope]] and require an upgraded [[Sawhorse]] with [[Moon Glass Saw Blade]] to prototype. {{clear}} ==Sanctum Relic== {{Object Infobox |name = Sanctum Relic |image = Sanctum Relic Table Round.png |biome = [[Sanctum]] |spawnCode = "vault_table_round" }} '''Sanctum Relic''' as table can be found in the [[Sanctum#Playbill|Playbill Room]] of the [[Sanctum]]. One of the tables holds the playbill "[[A Task Complete]]" and the other holds a [[Waymark Compass]]. {{clear}} == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Furniture Skins|Belongings}} ===Square Wooden Table Skins=== * The '''Woven - Distinguished Battered Wooden Table''' Issued for free on the eve of Halloween in 2023
{{SkinInfo |image = Cozy Square Table Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Decorator's Collection |name = Cozy Square Table |description = This table's wooden and a good'un. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Four-Leg Clover Table Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Fantasmical Collection |name = Four-Leg Clover Table |description = Good luck at the table! }} {{SkinInfo |image = Battered Wooden Table Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Hallowed Nighst Collection |name = Battered Wooden Table |description = Something about this old table makes your heart flutter with fear. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Parlor Square Table Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Parlor's Collection |name = Parlor Square Table |description = The table runner adds a touch of sophistication to the occasion. }} {{SkinInfo |image = Cawnival Show Table Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Cawnival Collection |name = Cawnival Show Table |description = Put your Cawnival prizes on display! }} {{SkinInfo |image = Briarwood Table Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Distinguished |collection = Rose Collection |name = Briarwood Table |description = A rose table by any other name wood smell as sweet. }}
